summary: Iteration 4 - Biodata Warga (per KK) + ImageUpload feature. Backend: 34/34 pytest cases passing (all previous 23 + 11 new for warga CRUD with anggota nesting, status validation, upload auth/mime/size/static-serve, pengurus.foto field). Frontend: public Biodata section renders 3 seeded KK with 9 anggota cards, nav-warga link present, warga-search filter narrows by name ('Hidayat' -> 1 KK). Admin Biodata tab CRUD verified end-to-end: create new KK with anggota -> appears in list (4 rows), edit nama_kepala + add new anggota -> persists, delete via confirm dialog -> row removed. ImageUpload in Pengurus working: uploaded PNG via set_input_files, preview rendered with src https://...preview.emergentagent.com/api/uploads/{filename}.png. berita-gambar and galeri-gambar ImageUpload widgets present. Mobile (390x844): warga-section renders, no horizontal overflow, search input full-width (358px).
action_items: Testability: Add data-testid to nama / status / pekerjaan inputs inside biodata-anggota-{i} rows (e.g. biodata-anggota-nama-{i}, biodata-anggota-status-{i}, biodata-anggota-pekerjaan-{i}). Currently tests must enumerate query_selector_all('input:not([type=file])') and skip the hidden file input from ImageUpload, which is brittle.
Testability gap from iteration 3 still applies: form input fields in PengurusPanel / BeritaPanel / GaleriPanel could benefit from per-field data-testid for stable automation.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/upload accepts files but does not verify the file content matches the declared mime (only Content-Type header is checked). An attacker can upload an executable named .png with Content-Type image/png. Recommend validating with Pillow or python-magic to ensure the file is actually an image before saving.

/api/upload writes files with uuid.uuid4().hex + extension - safe, but no sub-directory partitioning. Over time UPLOAD_DIR may grow to thousands of files in a single dir which slows directory listings. Consider partitioning by yyyy/mm.

Uploaded files are never garbage collected when a Pengurus.foto or Anggota.foto is replaced or its parent doc deleted. Orphan files will accumulate in /app/backend/uploads. Recommend a background cleanup task or delete-on-update hook.

MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES check happens AFTER file.read() loads the entire body in memory. For multi-MB files this is OK at 4MB cap, but consider streaming with file.read(chunk) and aborting early to defend against DoS via huge bodies.

BiodataPanel.jsx - the first hidden <input type='file'> from the embedded ImageUpload component is the first input child of biodata-anggota-{i}, making positional input lookups in tests pick the hidden file picker instead of the nama field. Add per-field testids as noted above.

ImageUpload.jsx is mounted inside biodata-anggota rows without unique testId scoping per row when the picker input is reused — verify the testId prefix passes through cleanly (biodata-anggota-foto-{i}-input) to avoid duplicate IDs on a multi-row form.

Public GET /api/warga returns *all* KKs with full anggota (including foto + pekerjaan + status). For a real RT this may expose PII (KTP-equivalent details) to anonymous users. Consider redacting / requiring auth, or only returning summary fields for unauthenticated callers.
Frontend uses GET /api/warga without pagination — fine for ~3 seeded KKs but will scale poorly for a real RT (100+ KK).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 11 new tests: warga list/get/404, create-requires-auth, invalid-status, full CRUD lifecycle; upload auth/mime/valid/too-large; pengurus foto CRUD)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of automated flows (public warga, admin biodata CRUD, image upload preview, mobile)

seed_data_creation: Pytest creates and cleans up TEST_ prefixed KK + Pengurus + Berita + Galeri + Pengaduan. UI test cycle (create -> edit -> delete TEST_UI Kepala KK) completed cleanly so no residual UI data. test_upload_valid_png_accessible left one PNG file in /app/backend/uploads/ (acceptable, small ~70B).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 34 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run with `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. New endpoints: GET /api/warga (public), GET /api/warga/{id}, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/warga/{id} (admin), POST /api/upload (admin, multipart file), static mount /api/uploads/{filename}. Allowed mime: image/jpeg|png|webp|gif, max 4MB. Anggota status enum: Kepala Keluarga, Istri, Suami, Anak, Cucu, Orang Tua, Mertua, Saudara, Lainnya. Admin tabs now: profil/pengurus/statistik/biodata/berita/galeri/pengaduan (7 tabs). Frontend ImageUpload component has data-testid pattern: {testId}, {testId}-pick, {testId}-clear, {testId}-replace, {testId}-input. Biodata anggota rows lack per-field testids on nama/status/pekerjaan inputs - tests must use input:not([type=file]) and skip the hidden file input.
rca of the issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. All 34 backend tests pass, all UI flows for new Biodata feature verified end-to-end including create/edit/delete and file upload preview.
